## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, product updates, and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Knapsack is focusing on healthcare automation content, with prior authorizations as a key use case](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [The product demo showcased privacy-focused automations for email summaries and meeting prep](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs suggested improvements for user trust and content strategy, including source attribution](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [New tools (Clay, RB2B) were recommended to enhance lead generation and outreach from website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and SEO Progress

  - [AI in healthcare chosen as the next content cluster, with data privacy as a foreshadowing topic](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Current SEO metrics show expected flat growth for a new website, with articles being indexed](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content around Knapsack-specific features and automation ideas](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Recommendation to mention competitors in content to capture search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Knapsack Product Demo

  - [Onboarding flow emphasizes data privacy and local processing](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Initial automations include email summary and meeting prep](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Users can create custom automations using natural language, without coding](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Currently in "read mode," with plans for future "write mode" capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### User Privacy and Data Handling

  - [Discussion on meeting recording capabilities and data storage concerns](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Emphasis on Knapsack's privacy-first approach compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Suggestion to allow users to specify data sources for increased trust and control](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Lead Generation and Outreach Tools

  - [Introduction to RB2B for identifying website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Recommendation to use Clay for AI-powered lead scoring and outreach automation](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Potential integration with AISDR for automated SDR services](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)

### Product Launch and Beta Testing

  - [Knapsack plans to launch a new version within a week for early user feedback](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Current version is Mac-only](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Potential for enterprise deals with AI-sensitive companies like NVIDIA](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to sign up for Clay and add Jimmy to help set up lead generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to continue healthcare-focused content creation, incorporating Knapsack-specific features](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Explore content angles around different automation ideas inspired by the Knapsack demo](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Mark to prepare for upcoming product launch and gather early user feedback](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Investigate potential enterprise deals with AI-sensitive companies](https://fathom.video/share/PNJLVJsvoNiuhg-FUFfBcRzMzCYN8EWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
